name: Blown Kisses Erosion
outcome: Seductively bringing two fingers to their pursing plush lips, the trio lets out a collective teasing 'Mwah♥' in perfect unison as they cooingly blow the smooches your way, conjuring three floating hearts that fly through the air right into you, each magic impact sending a hot wave of melty enchanting tingles across your skin as the feeling of soft kisses radiates out all over your body!
miss: Seductively bringing two fingers to their pursing plush lips, the trio lets out a collective teasing 'Mwah♥' in perfect unison as they cooingly blow the smooches your way, conjuring three floating hearts that fly through the air, but you manage to evade the pulsing projectiles!
statusOutcome: The captivating kisses melt through your senses like sweet luxurious honey as they erode away at your rationality with growing pleasure-drunk need...
